Satheesan officially took the oath of office as the Chief Minister. Along with him, a full cabinet of 20 ministers was also sworn in. The Central Stadium was packed to the brim with a massive crowd witnessing the historic event. Meanwhile, the Secretariat is already reflecting the freshness of a policy shift.
